steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures on each side of the comma
steps.content: The blank is preceded by a complete independent clause and followed by a noun phrase with no verb.

steps.title: Apply the comma rule for modifying participles
steps.content:
”Citing the region's unique natural, cultural, and historical attributes” is a present participle phrase that modifies the main clause and explains Congress's reasoning for the designation.

The other options either create comma splices (A and D) or form incomplete constructions (B).

This matches choice C — C is correct.
